scripts.urls:
node -e "console.log('
🎮 Dev URLs:
Frontend: http://localhost:5173
Backend: http://localhost:8000/health
Postgres: localhost:5432

')"
scripts.check:users: docker compose exec db psql -U app_user -d app_db -c 'SELECT id, username, email, display_name, oauth_provider, oauth_id FROM users;'
scripts.check:tables: docker compose exec db psql -U app_user -d app_db -c '\dt'
scripts.check:games: docker compose exec db psql -U app_user -d app_db -c 'SELECT id, igdb_id, title, summary, cover_url, release_date, igdb_rating FROM games;'
scripts.setup:py: cd backend && ([ -d .venv ] || python3 -m venv .venv) && (./.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt || .\.venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt)
scripts.setup:py:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd backend; if (!(Test-Path .venv)) { py -m venv .venv }; .\.venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt"
scripts.start:win: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run setup:py:win; npm run dev; npm run urls"
scripts.start: npm run setup:py && npm run dev && npm run urls
